top3.sql:
SELECT e.event_name
FROM event e
JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
WHERE m.position = 'Vice President'
  AND m.link_to_major IN (
    SELECT major_id
    FROM major
    WHERE college = 'Student_Club'
      AND major_name = 'Student_Club'
      AND department = 'Student_Club'
  )
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_name
FROM event e
JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
WHERE m.position = 'Vice President'
AND m.zip IN (
    SELECT zip_code
    FROM zip_code
    WHERE city = 'East Lansing' AND state = 'MI'
)
AND e.type = 'social';

SELECT e.event_name
FROM event e
JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code
WHERE m.position = 'Vice President'
AND z.city = 'East Lansing'
AND z.state = 'MI'
AND e.type = 'social';

final.sql:
SELECT e.event_name
FROM event e
JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
WHERE m.position = 'Vice President'
  AND m.link_to_major IN (
    SELECT major_id
    FROM major
    WHERE college = 'Student_Club'
      AND major_name = 'Student_Club'
      AND department = 'Student_Club'
  )
LIMIT 1;
